source.title: Directed Evolution of Pseudomonas fluorescens Lipase Variants With Improved Thermostability Using Error-Prone PCR

initial_request.research_problem: Low thermostability of Pseudomonas fluorescens lipase (PFL) limits industrial application.
initial_request.known_context: Bacterial lipases have lower thermostability in industrial processes, which is a limiting factor in their industrial application.

evolution_trajectory.state_before: PFL has low thermostability (Tm 60°C), limiting industrial use.
evolution_trajectory.gap_or_uncertainty: Can random mutagenesis yield PFL variants with enhanced thermostability?
evolution_trajectory.hypothesis: Random mutagenesis via error-prone PCR can yield PFL variants with enhanced thermostability.
evolution_trajectory.decision: Use error-prone PCR to generate a mutant library.
evolution_trajectory.observation: Hypothesis formulated based on prior success of directed evolution for enzyme improvement.

evidence.quote_or_span: bacterial lipases have a lower thermostability in industrial processes, which was a limiting factor in their industrial application
we obtained an improve variant of Pseudomonas fluorescens lipase (PFL) with enhanced thermostability using classical error-prone PCR
As hoped, the triple mutant showed higher thermostability than either L218P or P184C/M243C, with an 8°C increase in the $T_{m}$ value (68°C) compared to 60°C for wild-type PFL.

evolution_trajectory.state_before: Hypothesis: error-prone PCR can improve PFL thermostability.
evolution_trajectory.gap_or_uncertainty: Need to generate diverse mutants for screening.
evolution_trajectory.hypothesis: A library of >3000 mutants will contain variants with improved thermostability.
evolution_trajectory.decision: Construct a mutant library of over 3000 clones using error-prone PCR.
evolution_trajectory.observation: A library containing over 3000 individual mutants was constructed.

evidence.quote_or_span: a library containing over 3000 individual mutants as constructed using error-prone PCR

evolution_trajectory.hypothesis: Screening for thermotolerance will identify mutants with increased Tm.
evolution_trajectory.decision: Screen library for thermotolerance and measure Tm of hits.
evolution_trajectory.observation: Mutants L218P and P184C/M243C identified with Tm values of 62.5°C and 66.0°C, increases of 2.5°C and 6°C over WT (60°C).
evolution_trajectory.next_step_reason: Combine beneficial mutations to test additive effect.

evidence.quote_or_span: Screening for thermotolerance yielded the mutants L218P and P184C/M243C with $T_{m}$ values of 62.5 and 66.0°C, which was 2.5 and 6°C higher than that of the WT, respectively
A library containing over 3000 individual mutants was constructed through mutagenesis by error-prone PCR, and screening identified L218P and P184C/M243C with $T_{m}$ values of 62.5 and 66.
A library containing over 3000 individual mutants was constructed through mutagenesis by error-prone PCR, and screening identified L218P and P184C/M243C with $T_{m}$ values of 62.
The $T_{m}$ values of the mutants L218P and P184C/M243C was increased from 60°C to 62.5 and 66.

evolution_trajectory.state_before: Single mutants L218P and P184C/M243C identified with Tm increases.
evolution_trajectory.gap_or_uncertainty: Will combining mutations yield additive thermostability improvement?
evolution_trajectory.hypothesis: Combining L218P and P184C/M243C will have an additive effect on Tm.
evolution_trajectory.decision: Create triple mutant P184C/M243C/L218P by site-directed mutagenesis.

evidence.quote_or_span: the combined triple mutant P184C/M243C/L218P was generated using site-directed mutagenesis using the plasmid P184C/M243C as the template

evolution_trajectory.gap_or_uncertainty: Does the triple mutant show additive thermostability improvement?
evolution_trajectory.hypothesis: Triple mutant will have Tm higher than single mutants, possibly additive.
evolution_trajectory.decision: Measure Tm and half-life of triple mutant.
evolution_trajectory.observation: Triple mutant Tm 68.0°C (+8°C vs WT), half-life increased 2.2-fold.
evolution_trajectory.next_step_reason: Analyze structural basis for improved thermostability.

evidence.quote_or_span: The combination of the two mutants (P184C/M243C/L218P) resulted in an approximately additive effect with a $T_{m}$ value of 68.0°C
As hoped, the triple mutant showed higher thermostability than either L218P or P184C/M243C, with an 8°C increase in the $T_{m}$ value (68°C) compared to 60°C for wild-type PFL.
Half-time of wild-type and mutant PFL was investigated at different temperature and pH, as shown in Table 2, the $t_{1/2}$ of the mutants L218P, P184C/M243C, and P184C/M243C/L218P was increased to 1.

Half-time of wild-type and mutant PFL was investigated at different temperature and pH, as shown in Table 2, the $t_{1/2}$ of the mutants L218P, P184C/M243C, and P184C/M243C/L218P was increased to 1.3-, 1.

evolution_trajectory.state_before: Triple mutant shows additive Tm increase and improved half-life.
evolution_trajectory.gap_or_uncertainty: What structural features cause the thermostability improvement?
evolution_trajectory.hypothesis: Disulfide bond (P184C-M243C) and proline substitution (L218P) reduce flexibility, enhancing thermostability.
evolution_trajectory.decision: Perform structural analysis using homology model.
evolution_trajectory.observation: Disulfide bond between P184C and M243C, and L218P substitution on a long random coil reduce flexibility, increasing thermostability.
evolution_trajectory.next_step_reason: Validate additional properties like methanol tolerance.

evidence.quote_or_span: Structural analysis revealed that the introduction of a disulfide bond between P184C and M243C and the substitution of Pro to reduce the flexibility of a loop increased the thermostability of PFL
The mutant P184C/M243C, which two has two additional cysteine residues, contained an intramolecular disulfide bond
The variant lipase L218P increased the thermostability due to the L to P substitution on a long random coil

Structural analysis of PFL revealed that the introduction of the disulfide bond between P184C and M243C and the substitution of proline increased the thermostability of PFL by reducing the flexibility of a loop and random coil

evolution_trajectory.gap_or_uncertainty: Do mutations affect other industrially relevant properties like methanol tolerance?
evolution_trajectory.hypothesis: Thermostabilizing mutations may also improve methanol tolerance.
evolution_trajectory.observation: Mutants showed dramatically increased methanol tolerance while retaining activity.

evidence.quote_or_span: the mutant also had dramatically increased methanol tolerance
Therefore, the tolerance to methanol of the mutants P184C/M243C, L218P, and P184C/M243C/L218P with purified enzyme was also determined.
While the wild-type enzyme was inactive after 4 h of incubation, P184C/M243C, L218P, and P184C/M243C/L218P retained 32.
While the wild-type enzyme was inactive after 4 h of incubation, P184C/M243C, L218P, and P184C/M243C/L218P retained 32.0, 20.

evolution_trajectory.state_before: Mutants show improved thermostability and methanol tolerance.
evolution_trajectory.gap_or_uncertainty: Are the improvements sufficient for industrial application?
evolution_trajectory.hypothesis: The 8°C Tm increase is modest, and structural analysis relies on a homology model.
evolution_trajectory.decision: Note limitations: modest Tm increase and reliance on homology model.
evolution_trajectory.observation: Tm increase not substantial (8°C); structural analysis based on homology model.

evidence.quote_or_span: Although the increase of $T_{m}$ was not substantial
which provides a theoretical foundation and preliminary information on improving the thermostability of lipases from family I.1

success_verification.final_conclusion: Error-prone PCR yielded PFL mutants L218P and P184C/M243C with Tm increases of 2.5°C and 6°C. Combined triple mutant P184C/M243C/L218P showed additive effect with Tm 68.0°C (+8°C) and 2.2-fold half-life increase. Structural analysis revealed disulfide bond and proline substitution reduce flexibility. Mutants also showed increased methanol tolerance. However, Tm increase was modest and structural analysis relied on a homology model.
limitations: Modest Tm increase (8°C) may not be sufficient for all industrial applications.
Structural analysis based on homology model.
